summary: A Fox News split-screen interview (Harris Faulkner with DHS Asst Secretary Tricia McLaughlin) about the murder of a Georgia woman by an illegal immigrant, with inset victim and suspect photos and a Georgia map. It is a talking-head news interview, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS ASST SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS; ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SUSPECTED OF MURDER OF GA MOM ALSO CHARGED WITH RAPE AND NECROPHILIA; FOX NEWS ALERT
